name: Sesame Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 whole Chicken breasts, skinned, boned, and halved horizontally
½ Ginger, fresh, peeled and halved
recipeInstructions:
MARINADE
1. In a food processor, mince garlic and ginger.
2. Add the remaining marinade ingredients and process for 2 seconds.
3. Pour over chicken pieces, turning to coat. Cover and marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes, or up to 4 hours in the refrigerator, stirring occasionally.
SAUCE
1. Mix all sauce ingredients together in a food processor until well blended.
2. Set aside.
STIR-FRY
1. Heat a tablespoon of peanut oil and a tablespoon of sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
2. Add chicken pieces and stir-fry quickly until opaque, but do not overcook. Remove the cooked pieces to a bowl or plate.
3. Repeat with remaining oil and chicken.
4. Return all chicken to the wok, add dried mushrooms (if using), toasted sesame seeds, and half of the lemon slices.
5. Pour in the prepared sauce and stir-fry until heated through.
6. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
7. Arrange on a warmed serving platter and garnish with remaining lemon slices. Serve with fluffy white rice.
Bon Appétit LIGHT AND EASY SPECIAL P52
